# Vancouver Island Regional Database (VIRD)

## Core Repositories
- [Water Systems Registry](https://vancouver-island-regional-database.github.io/water-systems/): Public disclosure mirror for regional water assets, audits, and minutes.
- [Natural Resources Registry](https://vancouver-island-regional-database.github.io/natural-resources/): Public disclosure mirror for regional natural resources data and minutes.
- [Land Use Planning Registry](https://vancouver-island-regional-database.github.io/land-use-planning/): Public disclosure mirror for regional land use planning data and minutes.
- [Land Use Planning Registry](https://vancouver-island-regional-database.github.io/land-use-planning/): Public disclosure mirror for regional land use planning data and minutes.
